See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 56211 => 'Santiago, Región Metropolitana', 562198 => 'Santiago, Región Metropolitana', 5622 => 'Santiago, Región Metropolitana', 5623 => 'Santiago, Región Metropolitana', 5626 => 'Santiago, Región Metropolitana', 5658 => 'Arica, Arica y Parinacota', 5661 => 'Punta Arenas, Magallanes', 5667 => 'Coihaique, Aysén', ];
